positive: A majestic, stylized nocturnal fox spirit (kitsune-inspired, celestial fox) composed with flowing, intricate outlines and strong negative space. The fox is seated in a central, symmetrical composition, surrounded by bioluminescent cosmic elements, stylized moons, and delicate floral filigree. The art style is a blend of neo-traditional tattoo design and ethereal cosmic vaporwave, featuring deep indigo and midnight blue tones contrasted with brilliant gold, teal, and magenta accents. The image must have clean vector edges, high contrast, and deep, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, making it highly suitable for print on apparel. Full body silhouette, symmetrical framing, central focal point.
negative: blurry, noise, jpeg artifacts, text, watermark, signature, username, low resolution, bad anatomy, poorly drawn, cropped, extra limbs, messy, sketch, grayscale, monochrome
